tasks.intent:
You are on BoatTrader results (private sellers, $35K+, near 33101).

Process the THIRD listing (scroll past the first two):
1. Find the third listing on the page
2. Click it to open
3. Scroll through — read Description and More Details for a phone number
4. Phone patterns: (555)555-5555, 555-555-5555, 10+ digits
5. Extract: year, make, model, price, phone, boat type, URL, seller name
6. Go back (Alt+Left)

terminate('success') with: VIABLE or SKIPPED + all data

Enter a second lead into PopYachts. Navigate to the lead entry form:
https://admin.popyachts.com/Page/Account-Main-Seller-Lead-Review-External/NA/Page.html

Enter this data:
- Year: 2021
- Make: Sea Ray
- Model: SPX 210
- Type: Bowrider
- Asking Price: 52000
- Seller Name: Unknown
- Seller Phone: 786-555-4321
- URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/2021-sea-ray-spx-210

1. Select 'Outside Boat Lead' if selector exists
2. Click each field and type the value
3. Scroll to find all fields
4. Click Submit
5. URL changed = success

terminate('success') if submitted.
